title: 朝日杯FSの後に・熱い期待

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The stands of Hanshin Racecourse are filled with
lively discussion after the Asahi Hai F.S. ends.

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Was Fuji Kiseki incredible or what? I think she
might be the best in her generation!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
No doubt about it. All eyes'll be on her once she
starts her classic year!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
I really hope she manages to become a Triple
Crown Champion!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Once Fuji Kiseki finishes changing, I check the
location of our accommodations, when...

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
Miss Fuji Kiseki, congratulations on your
excellent performance today!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: An eager-looking reporter runs up to us.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
We can't wait to see how you'll do in the future!
Could I get a few comments from you?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's great that she's so excited, but I don't want
her to stress out Fuji Kiseki with her sudden
questions.
choice_data_list:
I'm sorry, but please arrange any interviews
through the school fir—

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hold on, Trainer. There's something I actually
want to say to the world.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: Thank you! I'm all ears!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
"If upon receiving unconditional love one's heart
is freed from its shell, then they will strive
tirelessly to become others' light."

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Someone told me that long ago, and it came to
mind during today's race.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I heard everyone's cheers of support. They
allowed me to aim for victory, wholeheartedly
and single-mindedly.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for your love. Please look forward to
the moment I claim the Classic Triple Crown!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
How was that? Good enough for an article, I
hope?

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: That was perfect! Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Thank you! I'm excited to see what you'll write.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Also, I can't always take impromptu interviews
like this, so please seek permission from my
school first next time, okay?

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: O-oh! Right, of course!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Good! Take care now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki's gentle gaze must be too potent for
her because the reporter turns bright red before
running off.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The next morning, while we're en route to the
academy...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, there are already articles about me! They
must have really fast writers.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The articles she finds online are accompanied by
expertly shot pictures of her and rather
passionate reports of her race.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Let's see... "Fuji Kiseki Charms Crowd with
Stupendous Performance at Asahi Hai F.S. and
Forges On with Gratitude."

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
"Next Year's Star Confirmed." Ahaha! They made
me sound so cool! This is great!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
A lot of people in the comments have high
expectations for me as well! How wonderful!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: So, what race should we tackle next?
choice_data_list: How do you feel about the Yayoi Sho?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Great, considering I was going to suggest the
same!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I was hoping to prepare for the Satsuki Sho by
running a 2,000-meter race on the big stage, you
see.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki was able to show the world just what
she's made of in the Asahi Hai F.S.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But I want her to aim even higher and run even
harder at the Yayoi Sho.
